editorsdojo

刀Freelance Short-Form Video Editor

Train the cut.Master the reel.

編

In the editorsdojo, raw footage becomes disciplined short-form edits — cinematic, clear, and built to hold attention.

edit with discipline.

For creators, coaches, and personal brands who want premium pacing, clean visuals, and edits that feel intentional — not rushed.

01 — Portfolio

Selected edits

A small collection of crafted edits, sample work, and practice pieces.

No fake claims. No overhyped results. Just real edits that show the style, pacing, and attention to detail behind editorsdojo.

View Full Portfolio

02 — Services

Editing styles for personal brands

Two clean editing styles built for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

01

Viral Cinematic Reels

Fast, cinematic short-form edits with strong hooks, clean cuts, captions, sound design, and a premium look that helps your content hold attention.

02

White Minimal Animation

Clean white-style edits with smooth text animation, simple motion, and a modern look. Perfect for educational, business, and personal brand content.

03

Free Sample Edit

Send me one raw clip and I'll create a short sample edit, so you can see the style before working together.

Learn more about services →

03 — Process

From raw clip to polished edit

A simple process made to keep things easy from the first message to the final video.

01

Send a Raw Clip

Share your unedited footage and tell me what you want the video to feel like.

02

Set the Direction

We choose the editing style, pace, mood, and overall look.

03

Get a Sample Edit

I create a short free sample so you can see how your content could look.

04

Move Forward

If you like the style, we can work together on more videos.

Get Started

Raw footage in. Premium content out.

Let's see what your content can look like with a clean, sharp, story-driven edit.
